notes: Core mechanics mostly work (movement, vehicles, platforms, lives, scoring) but home detection logic is flawed (homeIdx calculation unreliable), frog column can go out of bounds on river carry, and visual fidelity is minimal with plain rectangles and a circle for the frog rather than proper Frogger aesthetics.
Core Frogger loop is present and mostly works, but home-slot logic/alignment and some rough collision/carry behavior make it feel noticeably imperfect rather than benchmark-quality.
